auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.

today.title: Today
today.all_completed: All activities completed — God bless you!

priest.title: Priest
priest.manage_subtitle: Manage your God Children and publish spiritual quotes
priest.quote_placeholder: e.g. Pray for the peace of the Church...
priest.quote_broadcast: This will appear on every God Child's screen instantly.
priest.quote_success: ✓ Quote published and broadcast to all God Children!
priest.summary_excellent: A blessed week of spiritual growth. {name} has been steadfast in walking The Way. May the Holy Spirit continue to strengthen their journey.
priest.summary_good: {name} is making a sincere effort, particularly in {activity}. Let us pray for continued grace and consistency in the coming days.
priest.summary_low: A time for grace and renewal. {name} has had a quiet week. Let us keep them in our prayers to reignite their spiritual devotion.
priest.review_placeholder: Write your spiritual review for this child...
priest.confirm_deactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate this God Child?
priest.confirm_activate: Are you sure you want to reactivate this God Child?
priest.confirm_delete: Are you sure? This permanently deletes the GodChild and all their data.

landing.verse: I am the way, the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me.

notes.title: Personal Notes
notes.placeholder: Write your spiritual reflections, prayers, or thoughts...
notes.empty: No notes yet. Write your first spiritual reflection.

godchild_scripture.title: The Gospel Foundation
godchild_scripture.intro: "For I was hungry and you gave Me food; I was thirsty and you gave Me drink; I was a stranger and you took Me in; I was naked and you clothed Me; I was sick and you visited Me; I was in prison and you came to Me."

priest_scripture.title: The Shepherd's Charge
priest_scripture.intro: Jesus said to Simon Peter, "Simon, son of John, do you love Me with supreme devotion more than these?" He said to Him, "Yes, Lord, You know that I regard You with affection." Jesus said to him, "Feed My lambs. Shepherd My sheep. Feed My sheep."
